provenance.source_corpus: Effects of prescribed fire on habitat of beaver (Castor canadensis) in Elk Island National Park, Canada

source_spans.text: Especially when combined with drought and herbivory, prescribed fire does not improve beaver habitat.
Our results show that repeated burning dramatically decreases beaver lodge occupancy
The combination of drought and fire had a devastating effect on beaver in EINP in 2000.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:664d6745e094
edges.original_sentence: Our results show that repeated burning dramatically decreases beaver lodge occupancy, and that even after one burn the number of active colonies declines and does not recover to pre-fire populations.

source_spans.text: Our results show that repeated burning dramatically decreases beaver lodge occupancy, and that even after one burn the number of active colonies declines and does not recover to pre-fire populations.
